text: KITCHENPERMIT BACK TO LOGIN ONE-TIME LINK Set a new account password. This link does not reveal the old password. It only lets the account owner choose a new one. After the password is updated, return to login and use the new password for the dashboard. PASSWORD RESET New password Choose a password with at least 8 characters. Set a new password After this saves, the old password stops working. NEW PASSWORD CONFIRM NEW PASSWORD Update password
